top3.sql:
WITH first_terms AS (
    SELECT 
        l.gender,
        lt.state,
        MIN(lt.term_start) AS first_term_start
    FROM legislators l
    JOIN legislators_terms lt ON l.id_bioguide = lt.id_bioguide
    WHERE lt.term_type = 'house' OR lt.term_type = 'senate'
    GROUP BY l.gender, lt.state
),
retention_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        ft.gender,
        ft.state,
        CAST((julianday('12-31-' || substr(ft.first_term_start, 1, 4) + 0) - julianday(ft.first_term_start)) / 365.25 AS INTEGER) ...

WITH first_terms AS (
    SELECT 
        l.gender,
        lt.state,
        MIN(lt.term_start) AS first_term_start
    FROM legislators l
    JOIN legislators_terms lt ON l.id_bioguide = lt.id_bioguide
    WHERE lt.term_type = 'house' OR lt.term_type = 'senate'
    GROUP BY l.gender, lt.state
),
retention_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        ft.gender,
        ft.state,
        CAST((julianday('12-31-' || substr(ft.first_term_start, 1, 4) + 0) - julianday(ft.first_term_start)) / 365.25 AS INTEGER) ...
